title: Age of Origins:Tower Defense
developer: Hong Kong Ke Mo software Co., Limited
notes: Optimized some of the game play.

title: Coin Master - Board Adventure
notes: Welcome to Coin Master: Board Adventure, where every dice roll takes you closer to riches, revenge, and all-out fun! Collect coins, attack villages, build your empire, and explore wild new boards full of surprises. It's not just a board game - it's a bold adventure!

title: Tiles Survive!
notes:
[What's New]
- The Wall of Honor System: Celebrate your Heroes' achievements and unlock a brand-new progression path for fully upgraded SSR Heroes!
1. Access: Once a Hero reaches 10-Star, their Wall of Honor can be unlocked through the Hero Academy.
2. Core Progression: 10-Star Heroes are displayed by faction (Stalwart, Aeronaut, Rover, and Mariner). Spend Hero Fragments and Hero EXP to increase their Honor Level. Each Honor Level grants permanent Power bonuses.

[Optimizations & Fixes]
- Update

title: Dawn Watch: Survival
developer: STARFORTUNE INTERACTIVE ENTERTAINMENT TECHNOLOGY CO., LIMITED
notes:
[New Content]
1. Light Crystal Buildings: Light Crystal Lv. 8 Buildings will unlock after the State has been active for a specified period.
2. Light Crystal Troops: Light Crystal Lv. 8 Troops will gain access to additional Light Crystal Skills.

title: Screwdom
notes:
New Event: Puzzle Pieces. Complete levels and collect puzzle pieces to earn special rewards.
New Seasonal: Summer Pass. Enjoy a sunny adventure packed with exclusive rewards.
Bug fixes and performance improvements.

title: Foundation: Galactic Frontier
notes:
Update Highlights:
1. Optimized the duration of the Sacred Tribute Vessel, which is now set to 3 hours.
2. Improved the display of Guild Chest information by removing portrait frames.
3. Other optimizations and bug fixes.
